assertions.assertion: Uses CookieContainer and HttpClientHandler with AllowAutoRedirect = false for cookie-based session simulation
assertions.rationale: Does not use CookieContainer or HttpClientHandler. Instead uses WebApplicationFactoryClientOptions with AllowAutoRedirect = false, which does not provide cookie-based session simulation.

assertions.assertion: Test asserts /bff/user returns HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized (401) without a prior login
assertions.rationale: The test uses Assert.True with an OR condition checking for either Unauthorized OR Redirect. The assertion requires a strict 401 assertion, not a disjunction.

assertions.assertion: Test asserts the local API route returns HttpStatusCode.BadRequest (400) when the x-csrf header is missing
assertions.rationale: ApiEndpoint_WithoutCsrfHeader_ReturnsBadRequest test asserts Assert.Equal(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest, response.StatusCode) for a request without the x-csrf header.

assertions.assertion: Includes the x-csrf: 1 header on the antiforgery-passing test case
assertions.rationale: ApiEndpoint_WithCsrfHeader_DoesNotReturn400 test adds _client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("x-csrf", "1") before making the request.
